title: Spartan Re-Shine
description: I created a resource pack to retexture Spartan Weaponry mod by ObliviousSpartan, and Spartan Aether.
body:
I created a resource pack to retexture Spartan Weaponry mod by ObliviousSpartan, and Spartan Aether.

I felt like the current textures needed a whole new updated design that aligns with modern minecraft.
This pack changes every single item including the dynamite and other miscellaneous items in the mod, it also changes the items for vanilla minecraft all the swords and tools have been changed to have a shinier look to them that aligns with vanilla ores for more consistency. 

![Here's a quick showcase including the new retextured vanilla items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40d6fb0135efa479ce7d929691aecf1eff0d538.png)

Check de gallery for the full showcase.
